summary: Iteration 7 - Supabase integration testing SUCCESSFUL. All backend API endpoints working correctly with real Supabase database. 10/11 backend tests passed (1 skipped - user auth not implemented). Frontend generate workout flow works end-to-end with real Supabase data. Verified 12 seeded exercises, workout generation, session management, and Iron Miles logging. No regressions from iteration 6. Integration complete: Frontend ↔ Backend ↔ Supabase all functioning correctly.

minor.issue: user_id field has foreign key constraint to profiles table. When user_id is provided, it must exist in profiles table. Currently works with user_id=null since auth not implemented.
minor.impact: No impact for current MVP. Will need to create user profiles when auth is added.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'
react_native_issues.impact: No functional impact - same as previous iterations

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'Animated: useNativeDriver is not supported because the native animated module is missing. Falling back to JS-based animation.'
react_native_issues.impact: Expected in web preview. Animation falls back to JS-based and works correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Supabase integration implemented correctly - all 6 tables created and functional
✅ Backend API endpoints all working: health, exercises, workouts, sessions, iron-miles
✅ 12 starter exercises seeded correctly in Supabase database
✅ Exercise filtering by category and equipment working correctly
✅ Workout generation creates workouts with 5 exercises from Supabase
✅ Iron Miles logging working - miles awarded on session completion
✅ Frontend successfully integrated with real backend API
✅ Generate workout flow works end-to-end with real Supabase data
✅ No hardcoded SAMPLE_WORKOUT data - real database integration confirmed
✅ Proper error handling in backend with try/catch blocks
✅ Pydantic models used for request/response validation
✅ Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL for API calls
✅ No regressions - previous UI functionality still works
⚠ user_id field has foreign key constraint - works with null for now, will need profiles when auth added

success_rate.backend: 91% - 10 passed, 1 skipped (test_get_iron_miles_for_user skipped due to no user auth)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - Dashboard loads, generate workout flow works end-to-end with real Supabase data

seed_data_creation: 12 starter exercises already seeded in Supabase by main agent. Test data created during tests (workouts, sessions, iron_miles_log entries) with null user_id.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 confirms Supabase integration is working correctly. Backend API endpoints tested: GET /api/health (supabase connected), GET /api/exercises (12 exercises), GET /api/exercises with filters (category, equipment), POST /api/workouts/generate (creates workout with 5 exercises), POST /api/sessions/start, POST /api/sessions/complete (awards Iron Miles), GET /api/iron-miles/{user_id}. Frontend generate workout flow tested end-to-end - successfully displays real exercises from Supabase database. No issues found. Integration is production-ready for MVP (no auth).

backend_tests_summary.skipped_reason: test_get_iron_miles_for_user skipped because user_id not available without authentication

test_classes.details: Health endpoint returns status 'healthy' and supabase 'connected'
GET /api/exercises returns 12 exercises. Filters by category (upper_body=5, lower_body=2+) and equipment (bodyweight) work correctly.
POST /api/workouts/generate creates workouts with exercises. Duration-based Iron Miles rewards correct (10 min = 10 miles, 20 min = 20 miles).
POST /api/sessions/start creates session. POST /api/sessions/complete awards Iron Miles and logs to iron_miles_log table.
GET /api/iron-miles/{user_id} returns 0 for new user. test_get_iron_miles_for_user skipped (no user auth).

frontend_tests_summary.dashboard_load: ✅ PASSED - Dashboard loads with Iron Miles display, milestones, and GENERATE WORKOUT button

generate_workout_flow.step_1_target_area: ✅ PASSED - Target area selection screen loads, Upper Body selected
generate_workout_flow.step_2_equipment: ✅ PASSED - Equipment selection screen loads, Bodyweight and Bands selected
generate_workout_flow.step_3_duration: ✅ PASSED - Duration selection screen loads, 10 min selected
generate_workout_flow.step_4_workout_style: ✅ PASSED - Workout style selection screen loads, Strength selected
generate_workout_flow.step_5_loading: ✅ PASSED - Loading screen displays (animated progress bar)
generate_workout_flow.step_6_result: ✅ PASSED - Workout result screen displays with real Supabase exercises

real_supabase_data_verified.confirmation: ✅ All exercises match seeded data in Supabase. No hardcoded SAMPLE_WORKOUT used.

frontend_tests_summary.start_workout_button: ✅ PASSED - START WORKOUT button visible and ready

database_tables.profiles: ✅ Created (has foreign key constraint on user_id)

storage_buckets.exercise-videos: ✅ Created (not tested - no videos uploaded yet)
storage_buckets.exercise-thumbnails: ✅ Created (not tested - no thumbnails uploaded yet)

api_integration.frontend_to_backend: ✅ Working - Expo app calls backend API via EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL
api_integration.end_to_end: ✅ Working - Full flow from UI → Backend → Supabase → Backend → UI

comparison_to_iteration_6.functionality: Replaced hardcoded SAMPLE_WORKOUT with real Supabase database. Added backend API endpoints for exercises, workouts, sessions, Iron Miles.
comparison_to_iteration_6.visual_changes: None - UI unchanged. Same 8-step generate workout flow.
comparison_to_iteration_6.issues_resolved: None - this is a feature addition (database integration), not a bug fix
comparison_to_iteration_6.deprecation_warnings: Same as iteration 6 (props.pointerEvents, useNativeDriver) - both low priority

database_schema_notes.user_id_constraint: user_id fields in generated_workouts, workout_sessions, iron_miles_log have foreign key constraint to profiles.id. Currently works with user_id=null since no auth. Will need to create user profiles when auth is added.
database_schema_notes.exercise_seeding: 12 starter exercises seeded covering: upper_body (5), lower_body (2), core (1), mobility (3). Equipment types: bodyweight (7), bands (3), dumbbells (1). Workout styles: strength (9), mobility (2), burn (1), recovery (1).
database_schema_notes.iron_miles_calculation: Iron Miles reward based on duration: 5 min = 5 miles, 10 min = 10 miles, 20 min = 20 miles, 30 min = 30 miles.
